summary: Auth0 SSO integration testing complete. All backend endpoints working correctly. Found and FIXED a bug in frontend Auth0Callback.jsx (setToken undefined reference). All 13 backend tests pass, frontend Auth0 button renders correctly, callback page works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth0 SSO integration fully tested. Backend generates correct Auth0 authorization URLs. Callback validates state/code parameters. Session is created in MongoDB. Frontend has Auth0 login button (data-testid=auth0-login-button) and /auth/callback route renders Auth0Callback component. Existing email/password login unaffected.

auth0_login_endpoint.details: Returns auth_url with correct Auth0 domain, client_id, response_type=code, scope=openid profile email, state parameter

auth0_callback_validation.details: Returns 400 for missing code/state, returns 400 for invalid state

sso_session_creation.details: SSO session is created in MongoDB when auth0/login is called

frontend_auth0_button.details: Button renders with 'Sign in with Auth0' text

bug_fixed.fix: Changed dependency array from [searchParams, navigate, setToken] to [searchParams, navigate, loginWithToken]
bug_fixed.severity: Critical - prevented callback page from working

note_on_auth0_token_exchange: Actual Auth0 token exchange cannot be tested end-to-end without real Auth0 browser login flow, but all URL generation, parameter validation, and error handling are verified working
